name: Steam Profile
description: Shows a Steam profile with avatar, status, visibility, country, created date, game count, and playtime.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Profile**
SteamID: `{steam_id}`
Visibility: `{visibility}`
Status: `{persona_state}`
Country: `{country}`
Created: `{created_at}`
Last Online: `{last_online}`

**Library**
Games: `{game_count}`
Total Playtime: `{total_playtime}`
Recently Played: `{recent_games}`

**Links**
Profile: {profile_link}
